message: @trust_boundary test_ref 'tests/test_boundary.py::test_no_raise' resolves to 'test_no_raise' but the test body has no pytest.raises / with pytest.raises / assertRaises pattern.
suggestion: The referenced test does not assert on raising behaviour. The honesty gate requires the test body to contain at least one pytest.raises(...) context manager, pytest.raises(...) call, or unittest assertRaises(...) call.
